event_id.description: Unique identifier for the Snowplow event. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String. A natural primary or deduplication key.

event_name.description: Name of the Snowplow event. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String.

app_id.description: Application identifier the event was tracked from. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String.

user_id.description: Business or user-supplied user identifier. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String.

collector_tstamp.description: Timestamp the event was received by the Collector, in ISO 8601 format. Parsed by ClickHouse using flexible date-time parsing. Suggested ClickHouse column type: DateTime64(3).

web_page_id.description: Page view identifier from the Snowplow web page entity. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String. A missing entity produces an omitted field rather than an error.

domain_userid.description: First-party cookie identifier for the user's device. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String.

domain_sessionid.description: First-party cookie identifier for the user's session. Suggested ClickHouse column type: String.
